meta.title: CC
meta.description: A carousel displaying multiple cards with accent-colored backgrounds, titles, descriptions, and tertiary buttons with arrow icons

blockTypePatterns.library: Swiper.js with Navigation, Pagination, Autoplay, A11y modules

parentTsx: import { useBlockProps, InspectorControls, BlockControls, useInnerBlocksProps, store as blockEditorStore } from '@wordpress/block-editor';
import { PanelBody, ToggleControl, RangeControl, ToolbarButton, ToolbarGroup } from '@wordpress/components';
import { Navigation, Pagination, Autoplay, A11y } from 'swiper/modules';

requiredPatterns.usage: Wrap optional content areas in editor
Sync block name in list view with heading/title content
requiredPatterns.implementation: Call in ThemeHeading onChange (parent) and title onChange (child)

requiredPatterns.note: Must mirror TSX cn() calls exactly
Accepts string or array with conditions

requiredPatterns.usage: Parent block to render child blocks
Share columns setting from parent to child
Initialize Swiper in editor with proper cleanup

darkModePattern.wrapperClasses: relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8
darkModePattern.notes: Apply wrapper around both header and carousel content

qualityChecklist: TSX and PHP produce identical HTML structure
All conditional classes match between TSX and PHP
No hardcoded colors - uses theme tokens only
Uses shouldDisplay() for optional content in editor
Swiper config defined inline in both TSX and JS files
Frontend JS reads settings from data attributes

parent.name: darkMode
parent.description: Enable dark mode with charcoal card background

parent.name: columns
parent.description: Number of visible cards on desktop (max 2 on tablet, always 1 on mobile)

child.name: button
child.description: Card button/link with tertiary style and arrow icon

darkModeWrapper.classes: relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8

pagination.classes: swiper-pagination flex-1 relative! h-1 bg-white/20 rounded-full [&_.swiper-pagination-progressbar-fill]:bg-neon-green [&_.swiper-pagination-progressbar-fill]:rounded-full

desktop.button: cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed hover:text-neon-green focus:text-neon-green transition-colors *:w-10 *:h-auto

mobile.button: cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed hover:text-neon-green focus:text-neon-green transition-colors *:w-12 *:h-auto

card.inner: w-full h-full bg-accent rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col
card.title: text-header-5 text-charcoal mb-4

tertiaryButtonWithArrow.buttonClassName: btn-tertiary-arrow text-charcoal! group inline-flex items-center gap-2
tertiaryButtonWithArrow.arrowWrapper: inline-flex items-center justify-center w-6 h-6 rounded-full transition-all group-hover:bg-charcoal group-hover:text-neon-green group-focus:bg-charcoal group-focus:text-neon-green
tertiaryButtonWithArrow.notes: Arrow SVG is just the chevron, circle is CSS (rounded-full on wrapper). Hover/focus state adds bg-charcoal and text-neon-green

mobile.behavior: Single column, horizontal scroll with snap

responsive.notes: Swiper uses breakpointsBase: 'container' for more accurate responsive behavior

emptyState.heading: Hide if empty on frontend, show placeholder in editor
emptyState.cards: Show placeholder in editor via shouldDisplay(), hide on frontend if empty

editorBehavior.blockNaming: renameBlock() synced to heading (parent) and title (child)
editorBehavior.cardManagement: Use Appender component for adding new cards
editorBehavior.swiperEditing: Disable loop/autoplay when block or children are focused

child.usage: Access via context['takt/cc/columns'] in TSX, $block->context['takt/cc/columns'] in PHP

navigation.prevButton: aria-label and title for Previous Item
navigation.nextButton: aria-label and title for Next Item

button.newTabIndicator: Screen reader text for external links

arrowIconSvg.notes: Simple chevron arrow, no circle - circle is done with CSS wrapper

arrowLeft.notes: Left-pointing arrow for prev button, larger size for carousel navigation
arrowLeft.design: Similar style to ArrowIcon but pointing left

arrowRight.notes: Right-pointing arrow for next button, larger size for carousel navigation
arrowRight.design: Similar style to ArrowIcon but pointing right, matching hover state on neon-green

componentModifications.modification: Use existing 'after' prop to inject arrow icon for tertiary variant

implementation.tsx: Pass 'after' prop with arrow span wrapper and ArrowIcon component
implementation.php: Pass 'after' parameter with arrow span wrapper and inline SVG

componentModifications.notes: No modification to ThemeButton itself needed - it already supports 'before' and 'after' props

decisions.question: What background color for cards?
decisions.rationale: Spec explicitly states cards should use accent color background

decisions.question: What button variant for cards?
decisions.rationale: Spec explicitly states tertiary button with arrow injection via after prop

decisions.question: How to implement arrow hover state?
decisions.decision: CSS circle with bg-charcoal and text-neon-green on hover/focus
decisions.rationale: Spec states circle must be done with CSS, not SVG. Use group-hover pattern

decisions.question: What column options are available?
decisions.rationale: Spec explicitly states options are 1, 2, or 3

decisions.question: How do columns work responsively?
decisions.decision: Mobile: 1, Tablet: up to 2, Desktop: attribute value
decisions.rationale: Spec states mobile has 1 column, tablets up to 2 columns

decisions.question: How to implement dark mode?
decisions.decision: Follow ContentWithMedia pattern with pseudo-element charcoal cards
decisions.rationale: Spec references ContentWithMedia for dark mode implementation. Use transparent section bg with before pseudo-element

testPage.title: TEST: CC

variations.name: Default - Dark Mode with 3 Columns
variations.description: Default configuration with dark mode enabled

attributes.heading: Fostering Partnerships that Meet Your Needs

attributes.title: LGBTQ Resource Centre
attributes.description: The centre advocates and works towards building safer, braver and positive spaces.

attributes.description: A thriving hub of cultures, connections and empowerment for Black students.

attributes.title: Indigenous Education
attributes.description: The centre honours a wide variety of faiths and traditions.

variations.name: Light Mode
variations.description: Dark mode disabled - no charcoal background

attributes.title: Card One
attributes.description: First card in two column layout.

attributes.title: Card Two
attributes.description: Second card in two column layout.

attributes.title: Full Width Card
attributes.description: This card takes the full width of the carousel.

attributes.title: Information Card
attributes.description: This card has no button, just informational content.

variations.name: Long Content Edge Case
variations.description: Test overflow handling with long text

attributes.heading: This is a very long heading that should test how the block handles text that extends beyond the expected length
attributes.description: This is an intentionally long description to test how the layout handles extended text content across multiple lines.

attributes.title: Card with extremely long title that tests text wrapping and overflow behavior
attributes.description: This description is intentionally very long to test how the card handles large amounts of text content. It should either truncate gracefully or expand to accommodate the content without breaking the layout.

button.title: Learn More About This Long Topic

notes: Test at mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1440px)
Verify carousel scroll/swipe behavior on mobile
Check hover states on cards - arrow should get circle background
Verify dark mode charcoal card backgrounds extend correctly
Verify pagination progress bar updates correctly
Check that accent color applies correctly to card backgrounds

figmaAnalysis.notes: Desktop design provided. Tablet and mobile to be inferred from spec requirements (1 col mobile, max 2 col tablet)
